info.title: Hypedexer Live Data — REST API
info.description:
**HTTP:** All operations below use `POST {server}/info` with a JSON body. Path segments like `/info/metaAndAssetCtxs` are for documentation only — always POST to `/info` with the body described for each operation.

REST API for real-time Hyperliquid market data served from a local fullnode.

All data is accessed through a single unified endpoint `POST /info` that dispatches based on the `type` field in the JSON body.

## Request types

| Type | Description | Handled |
|------|-------------|----------|
| `metaAndAssetCtxs` | Asset context (funding, OI, prices) | Locally (Redis cache) |
| `allMids` | Mid prices for all coins | Locally (Redis cache) |
| `userFills` / `userFillsByTime` | Fills for a specific user | Locally (volume files) |
| `allFills` | All fills globally | Locally (volume files) |
| `trades` | Trade data | Locally (volume files) |
| `l2Book` / `l2Books` | L2 order book snapshot | Locally |
| `availableDates` | Available data dates | Locally |
| `clearinghouseState` | Clearinghouse state (single/multi-user) | Locally with upstream proxy per user |
| `meta`, `spotMeta`, `openOrders`, ... | Proxied to local Hyperliquid node | Proxied to upstream |

## Authentication

Optional. When `API_KEY` is configured on the server, all requests must include:
```
Authorization: Bearer <API_KEY>
```

## Response format

Most types return:
```json
{ "result": <data>, "cursor": null }
```

`allMids` returns the result directly (not wrapped):
```json
{ "BTC": "66764.5", "ETH": "3421.2" }
```

Proxied types return the upstream response as-is.

tags.name: Asset Context
tags.description: Real-time asset context data: funding, open interest, oracle/mark/mid prices, volumes. Sourced from Redis cache populated by the asset context worker.

tags.name: Mid Prices
tags.description: Mid prices for all coins, optionally filtered by DEX.

tags.name: Fills
tags.description: Executed fills from the Hyperliquid fullnode volumes. Supports user-specific and global queries.

tags.name: Trades
tags.description: Trade data from the fullnode volumes.

tags.name: Clearinghouse
tags.description: Clearinghouse state with multi-user support. Each user is fetched individually from the upstream Hyperliquid node.

tags.name: Perpetuals
tags.description: Perpetual market metadata, margin, OI caps, DEX configs.

tags.name: Spot
tags.description: Spot market metadata, balances, and deploy state.

tags.name: Trading
tags.description: Orders, positions, and active asset data.

tags.name: Account
tags.description: User account info: fees, rate limits, sub-accounts, agents, roles.

tags.name: Staking
tags.description: Delegations, staking summaries, and validator votes.

tags.name: Exchange
tags.description: Exchange status, liquidatable positions, web data.

get.description: Returns basic service information and endpoint pointers.

post.summary: Get asset context for a coin
post.description:
Returns the asset context for a specific coin: funding rate, open interest, oracle/mark/mid prices, premium, volumes, and impact prices.

Data is served from Redis cache, populated by a background worker that replays fullnode volume events and periodically refreshes from the Hyperliquid API.

Also accepts `type: "assetContext"` as an alias.

200.description: Asset context for the requested coin. Returns an empty context (all fields null) if no data is cached.

post.summary: Get mid prices for all coins
post.description:
Returns a map of coin symbol to mid price for all available coins.

Optionally filter by DEX:
- Omit `dex` or set to `null` → perps only
- `"ALL_DEXS"` → all DEXes and perps combined
- A specific DEX name (e.g. `"ORCA"`) → only that DEX

**Note:** This type returns the result directly (not wrapped in `{"result": ...}`).

dex.description: DEX filter. Omit for perps only, `ALL_DEXS` for all, or a specific DEX name.

200.description: Map of coin symbol to mid price string. Returned directly (no `result` wrapper).

post.summary: Get fills for a specific user
post.description:
Returns fills for one or more Ethereum addresses. Reads from the `node_fills` fullnode volume files.

Accepts both `type: "userFills"` and `type: "userFillsByTime"` (identical behavior).

Provide either `user` (single address) or `addresses` (list). Addresses are matched case-insensitively.

addresses.description: List of Ethereum addresses. Takes precedence over `user` if both provided.

startTime.description: Start timestamp in milliseconds since epoch

endTime.description: End timestamp in milliseconds since epoch

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return

200.description: List of fills with associated address

post.description: Returns all fills across all users from the `node_fills` fullnode volumes. Optionally filter by coin and time range.

200.description: List of fills with associated address

post.description: Returns trade data from the `node_trades` fullnode volumes. Optionally filter by coin and time range.

Returns an L2 order book snapshot for a coin.

Also accepts `type: "l2Books"` with a `coins` array parameter (returns the first coin's book).

coins.description: List of coin symbols (for l2Books, uses first coin)

post.description: Returns the list of available date directories in the fullnode volume data. Useful for determining the data range available for queries.

Returns the clearinghouse state for one or more users. Each user is fetched individually from the upstream Hyperliquid node.

**Single user:** Provide `user` → returns the upstream result directly.

**Multi-user:** Provide `users` array → returns a map of `{ address: result }` for each user (fetched in parallel).

Optionally pass `dex` to filter by DEX.

200.description: Clearinghouse state. Single user: upstream result directly. Multi-user: `{ address: result }` map.

oneOf.description: Multi-user result: map of address to upstream response

post.description:
Returns perpetual asset metadata: universe of listed perps with size decimals, max leverage, margin mode, and margin tier tables.

**

dex.description: Perp dex name. Defaults to the empty string (first perp dex).

post.description:
Returns spot trading metadata: token definitions (name, decimals, token ID) and trading pair universe.

**

Returns the spot balances for a user: token holdings with total, held, and entry notional amounts.

**

Returns the list of open orders for a user. Basic order fields: coin, price, side, size, timestamp.

**

dex.description: Perp dex name. Defaults to first perp dex.

post.description:
Like `openOrders` but with additional fields: order type, original size, reduce-only flag, trigger conditions, and TP/SL info.

**

dex.description: Perp dex name. Defaults to first perp dex.

200.description: Array of open orders with extended details

orderType.description: e.g. Limit, Stop Market, Take Profit

post.description:
Returns the current exchange status and operational state.

**

Returns positions that are currently eligible for liquidation.

**

post.summary: Active asset data for a user
post.description:
Returns the user's active position data for a specific coin: current leverage, max trade sizes, available-to-trade amounts, and mark price.

**

Returns the maximum notional values allowed for market orders on each asset.

**

200.description: Max market order notionals per asset

post.description:
Returns summary information for all vaults.

**

Returns the user's equity in each vault they have deposited into.

**

Returns the top-performing vaults ranked by performance metrics.

**

200.description: Array of leading vault objects with performance data

post.description:
Returns the list of extra agents (API wallets) authorized by a user for programmatic trading.

**

Returns the user's sub-accounts with their name, address, clearinghouse state, and spot state.

**

Returns the user's fee schedule, current rates, daily volume breakdown, trial status, and staking discount information.

**

Returns the user's current rate limit status: cumulative volume, requests used, requests cap, and surplus.

**

Returns the current spot token deployment state and auction information.

**

200.description: Spot deploy state and auction info

post.description:
Returns the current perpetual listing auction status: start time, duration, and gas prices (start, current, end).

**

Returns the user's active staking delegations: validator address, delegated amount, and lock-up expiry timestamp.

**

Returns a summary of the user's staking activity: total delegated, undelegated, pending withdrawals.

**

Returns the maximum fee a user has approved for a specific builder address. The value is in tenths of a basis point.

**

200.description: Max builder fee in tenths of a basis point

post.description:
Returns the multi-sig signer configuration for a user address, if any.

**

200.description: Multi-sig signer configuration (array of signer addresses and threshold)

post.description:
Returns the user's role: `"user"` for a normal user, `"agent"` for an API wallet (with the parent user in `data.user`).

**

Returns the list of perpetual assets that are currently at their open interest cap (new positions may be restricted).

**

dex.description: Perp dex name. If not specified, uses first perp dex.

200.description: Array of coin names at OI cap

post.description:
Returns the L1 validator voting information.

**

Returns the margin tier table configuration used for risk calculations.

**

Returns the list of all perpetual DEXes including deployer, oracle updater, fee recipient, and per-asset OI cap / funding multiplier configurations.

**

200.description: Array of perp DEX objects (index 0 may be null for the default DEX)

post.description:
Returns aggregated data used by the Hyperliquid web frontend. Includes market summaries, user state, and UI-specific data.

**

BearerAuth.description: Optional. API key passed via `Authorization: Bearer <key>`. Required only when `API_KEY` is configured on the server.

Unauthorized.description: Invalid or missing API key (only when `API_KEY` is configured on the server)

UpstreamUnreachable.description: The upstream Hyperliquid node is unreachable

AssetContext.description: Asset context aligned with `metaAndAssetCtxs[1][i]` from the Hyperliquid API. Numeric values are strings to preserve precision. Fields are null when no data is available.

AllMids.description: Map of coin symbol to mid price string

Fill.description: A single fill from the Hyperliquid fullnode

crossed.description: Whether the order crossed the spread

AddressedFill.description: A fill paired with its user address

Trade.description: A trade record from the fullnode volumes

L2BookSnapshot.description: L2 order book snapshot for a coin

levels.description: Order book levels (may be empty if no snapshot available)

timestamp.description: Snapshot timestamp in milliseconds (null if no data)
